case_title: ROBINSON, CARLA vs. TRAN, HUY QUOC et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, CARLA AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, HUY QUOC TRAN, GIOI VNA DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-26-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-30-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-06-1997

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-26-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-26-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND OSC FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR MAR-28-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL COVER SHEET FILED BY PLTF.
